subject: [INT] Release 8.0.0
commit_message:
[INT] Release 8.0.0

publish a release to have some pinned version

Change-Id: Ie0cd7bc5a9b0d4b71ff573be3dd365de449cf200

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-xtesting-master-commit-lint/303/ )

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-xtesting-master-commit-lint/303/ )
